abstract: The players currently in the game.
overview:
## Discussion

This array should contain instances of your player class (a custom class implementing the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGameModelPlayer] protocol) representing the players in the game. When you use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKMinmaxStrategist] class to find an optimal move for a specific player, GameplayKit uses this array to rate the moves of that player’s opponent(s).

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

# players

**Instance Property**

The players currently in the game.

## Declaration

```swift
var players: [any GKGameModelPlayer]? { get }
```

## Discussion

This array should contain instances of your player class (a custom class implementing the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGameModelPlayer] protocol) representing the players in the game. When you use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKMinmaxStrategist] class to find an optimal move for a specific player, GameplayKit uses this array to rate the moves of that player’s opponent(s).

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

## Keeping Track of Players

- **activePlayer**: The player whose turn it currently is in the game.
